LSE-MS7-L4-1400P-MSSS7-TTM-IMR-02 • MS Social Studies Grade 7 • 8.10 The Civil War

The German Regiment

Click   🎧   to listen.
Listen to a conversation between a girl and a boy. Listen carefully. You will hear the conversation only once. After listening, you will answer a question.
Listen to the Conversation
QUESTION:
What did the girl and the boy realize about the Union army?
Choose the best answer. You may change your answer before submitting.
SMART SUPPORT:
Go back to the conversation. Construct a complete academic justification. State your claim about what the girl observes, support that claim with reasoning drawn directly from what the boy says, and articulate the conclusion that follows about the army.
